nasb.text: May the arrogant be ashamed, for they subvert me with a lie; But I shall meditate on Your precepts.

esv.text: Let the insolent be put to shame, because they have wronged me with falsehood; as for me, I will meditate on your precepts.

cnv.text: 願傲慢人蒙羞，因為他們以詭詐誣衊我； 至於我，我卻要默想你的訓詞。

ccb.text: 愿狂傲人受辱， 因他们诋毁我； 但我要思想你的法则。

csbs.text: 愿傲慢人蒙羞，因为他们以虚谎屈枉我； 但我要默想你的训诫。
